# REPS

> REPS is the professional standard for fitness — a verified register of personal trainers, coaches, nutritionists and instructors, plus the platform that powers their businesses (shop-front, operations, coaching, growth).

REPS combines two things in one product: a public-facing trust layer (verified qualifications, identity, insurance) and a complete operating platform for fitness professionals (client-facing shop-front, enquiries, bookings, payments, programming, check-ins, growth analytics).

## Pages

- [Home](/): What REPs is and who it's for.
- [About](/about): The team, mission and history behind REPs.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): The end-to-end client and professional journey.
- [Find a professional](/find-a-professional): Search the public register of verified trainers, coaches and instructors.
- [For professionals](/for-professionals): The platform pitch for fitness professionals.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Verified, Pro and Studio tiers.
- [Standards](/standards): The standards every REPs-registered professional meets.
- [CPD](/cpd): Continuing professional development for registered pros.
- [Specialisms](/specialisms): The professions REPs registers (PT, group ex, strength, online, nutritionist, yoga, Pilates).
- [Business tools](/business-tools): The Pro / Studio business platform overview.
- [Resources](/resources): Long-form articles for fitness professionals and clients.

## Features

- [Visibility](/features/visibility): Verified profile + discovery surface for getting found.
- [Shop-front](/features/shop-front): Client-facing page for services, packages, enquiries and payment.
- [Operations](/features/operations): Enquiries, bookings, forms, waivers, payments and client records.
- [Coaching](/features/coaching): Programmes, nutrition, check-ins and the client portal.
- [Growth](/features/growth): Conversion, retention, reviews and business performance.
- [AI](/features/ai): REPs AI — ranked actions, drafted replies and risk alerts.

- [Compare](/compare): How REPs compares to other tools.

- [REPs vs Trainerize](/compare/reps-vs-trainerize)
- [Comparison methodology](/comparison-methodology): How comparisons are sourced and dated.
